selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 网, 网状物, 罗网, 净利, 净价；a. 净的, 最终的
words.definition: n. a trap made of netting to catch fish or birds or insects

words.translation: n. 一半, 半场, 不完全；a. 一半的, 不完全的, 部分的, 半场的
words.definition: n. one of two divisions into which some games or performances are divided: the two divisions are separated by an interval

words.translation: n. 马, 骑兵, 脚架；vi. 骑马, 取笑
words.definition: n. solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped domesticated since prehistoric times

words.translation: n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量
words.definition: n. a division of an ocean or a large body of salt water partially enclosed by land

words.translation: n. 头发, 毛发, 些微
words.definition: n. a covering for the body (or parts of it) consisting of a dense growth of threadlike structures (as on the human head); helps to prevent heat loss

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: n. 淑女, 夫人, 女士, 贵妇
words.definition: n. a polite name for any woman

words.translation: n. 充足, 够, 很多；a. 充足的, 足够
words.definition: n. an adequate quantity; a quantity that is large enough to achieve a purpose

words.translation: n. 眼睛, 视力, 看；vt. 看, 注视
words.definition: n. the organ of sight

words.translation: n. 人, 人类；a. 人类的, 似人类的, 人性的, 有同情心的
adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 狮子, 狮子(星)座, 国际狮子会会员
words.definition: n. large gregarious predatory feline of Africa and India having a tawny coat with a shaggy mane in the male

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: a. 令人惊奇的, 奇妙的, 极好的
n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: vi. 拉, 拖, 拔剑；vt. 拖拉, 挨近, 领取, 打成平局, 引导, 抽签决定, 画, 描写, 制订, 草拟, 吸引
n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: n. 计划, 方案, 策略, 方法, 进度表, 程序表, 平面图, 设计图, 轮廓, 示意图；vt. 计划, 设计, 意欲
words.definition: n. a series of steps to be carried out or goals to be accomplished

words.translation: n. 上升, 增加, 上涨, 高地, 升高, 出现；vi. 升起, 起身, 起立, 上升, 上涨, 增长, 高耸, 起义, 浮现
words.definition: n. a growth in strength or number or importance

words.translation: n. 救球；vt. 解救, 挽救, 储蓄, 保存, 节省, 保留
words.definition: n. (sports) the act of preventing the opposition from scoring

words.translation: vt. 卖, 背叛, 销售, 出卖；vi. 卖, 销售
words.definition: v. exchange or deliver for money or its equivalent

words.translation: n. 种类, 方式, 品质, 态度, 举止；vt. 分类, 排序, 挑选
words.definition: n. an approximate definition or example

words.translation: n. 站立, 站住, 停顿, 讲台, 看台, 立场, 法院证人席；vi. 站, 立, 坐落, 停滞, 位于, 坚持, 维持原状
words.definition: n. the position where a thing or person stands

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 环, 环形物, 拳击场, 戒指, 角逐, 小集团, 铃声, 钟声, 声调；vt. 包围, 套住, 按铃, 敲钟
words.definition: n. a characteristic sound

words.translation: n. 尾部, 后部, 辫子, 随员, 特务, 燕尾服, 踪迹, 限定继承(权)；a. 在后面的, 从后面而来的, 限定继承的, 尾部的, 后部的
words.definition: n. the posterior part of the body of a vertebrate especially when elongated and extending beyond the trunk or main part of the body

words.translation: n. 鸟, 羽毛球；vi. 打鸟
words.definition: n. warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrates characterized by feathers and forelimbs modified as wings

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: a. 出名的, 极好的
n. 鱼, 鱼肉, 鱼类, 接合板；vt. 钓, 钓鱼, 查出, 用接合板连接
words.definition: n. any of various mostly cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates usually having scales and breathing through gills

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: n. 内部, 内脏, 内幕；a. 内部的, 秘密的, 户内的
words.definition: n. the region that is inside of something

words.translation: n. 自然, 大自然, 本性, 性格, 性质
words.definition: n. the essential qualities or characteristics by which something is recognized

words.translation: n. 预备好的状态, 现款；a. 准备好的, 备用的, 可以使用的
words.definition: n. poised for action

words.translation: n. 穿着, 戴, 使用, 耗损, 服装, 耐久性；vt. 穿着, 戴, 留(须、发等), 呈现, 磨损, 磨成, 耗损, 使疲乏, 消磨
words.definition: n. impairment resulting from long use

words.translation: n. 要求, 要求权, 断言, 权利；vt. 要求, 认领, 主张
words.definition: n. an assertion of a right (as to money or property)

words.translation: vt. 增加, 添加, 附带说明, 计算...总和；vi. 做加法, 积累而成, 增添
words.definition: v. make an addition (to); join or combine or unite with others; increase the quality, quantity, size or scope of

words.translation: adv. 以前
words.definition: r. in the past

words.translation: vi. 同意, 赞成, 应允, 适合；vt. 承认, 认定, 同意
words.definition: v. be in accord; be in agreement

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: prep. 在...之中
words.definition: prep. Alt. of Amongst

words.translation: a. 可利用的, 可获得的, 有效的
words.definition: a. obtainable or accessible and ready for use or service

words.translation: n. 生意, 事情, 业务, 商业, 商行, 职责
words.definition: n. a commercial or industrial enterprise and the people who constitute it

words.translation: n. 小心, 照料, 忧虑；vi. 关心, 介意
words.definition: n. the work of providing treatment for or attending to someone or something

words.translation: n. 原因, 目标；vt. 引起, 使产生, 使遭受
words.definition: n. events that provide the generative force that is the origin of something

words.translation: n. 机会, 意外, 可能性；vi. 偶然发生
words.definition: n. a risk involving danger

words.translation: a. 完全的, 十足的, 完成的；vt. 完成, 完工, 使圆满
n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: a. 早的, 早熟的；adv. 很早, 初
words.definition: a. at or near the beginning of a period of time or course of events or before the usual or expected time

words.translation: a. 容易的, 缓缓的, 舒适的, 从容的, 宽容的, 流畅的, 随便的, 自在的, 疲软的；adv. 容易地, 慢慢地
words.definition: a. posing no difficulty; requiring little effort

words.translation: a. 别的, 其他的；adv. 另外, 否则, 不然
words.definition: a. & pron. Other; one or something beside; as, Who else is

words.translation: pron. 每件事物, 所有事物
words.definition: n. Whatever pertains to the subject under consideration;

words.translation: n. 例子, 样本, 实例
words.definition: n. an item of information that is typical of a class or group

words.translation: vi. 失败, 缺乏, 中断, 衰退, 失灵；vt. 忘记, 使...失望, 缺乏, 不及格
words.definition: v. fail to do something; leave something undone

words.translation: n. 落下, 瀑布, 采伐量, 下降, 落差, 降低, 堕落, 秋天；vi. 倒下, 落下, 来临, 失守, 阵亡, 下跌, 减弱, 倾斜, 垮台, 轮到, 变成, 降低
words.definition: n. the season when the leaves fall from the trees

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: n. 恐怖, 害怕, 担心；v. 害怕, 恐惧, 为...担心, 敬畏

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 历史, 过去, 经历, 发展过程, 历史学, 过去的事, 历史记录

words.translation: n. 希望, 信心, 期待；v. 希望, 期望, 信赖

words.translation: n. 杀, 杀戮, 小河；vt. 杀, 破坏, 消灭, 使终止, 抵消, 否决

words.translation: n. 陆地, 地面, 地界, 地产, 国土, 土地；vi. 登陆, 登岸, 到达

words.translation: a. 迟的, 晚的, 已故的；adv. 很晚, 很迟, 晚
words.definition: a. being or occurring at an advanced period of time or after a usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 法律, 法则, 定律, 法律的制约, 法学, 司法界, 诉讼；v. 起诉

words.translation: n. 最少, 最小, 最小限度；a. 最少的, 最小的
words.definition: n. something that is of no importance

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的

words.translation: n. 低点, 低价, 低, 牛叫声；a. 低的, 消沉的, 低等的, 浅的, 卑贱的

words.translation: n. 会, 集会；a. 适宜的, 合适的

words.translation: n. 音乐, 乐曲

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经

words.translation: n. 页, 记录, 事件, 专栏, 男侍；vt. 标明...的页数, 翻...的书页, 分页排版, 呼叫, 侍候

words.translation: adv. 也许, 大概

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字

words.translation: n. 感应, 感觉, 感官, 意识, 观念, 情理, 知觉, 理智；vt. 感觉, 觉察, 检测

words.translation: n. 蛇, 阴险的人；vi. 曲折行进
words.definition: n. limbless scaly elongate reptile; some are venomous

words.translation: a. 社会的, 群居的, 社交的；n. 联欢会
words.definition: a. relating to human society and its members

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可

words.translation: n. 停止, 车站, 逗留, 填塞, 障碍, (风琴的)音栓；vi. 停止, 被塞住

words.translation: n. 街道, 马路, 街区；a. 街道的

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽

words.definition: r. at or in or to any place; (`anyplace' is used informally for `anywhere')

words.translation: a. 高兴的, 喜欢的, 情愿的

words.translation: n. 兽皮, 迹象, 躲藏处；vt. 藏, 隐瞒, 遮避, 剥...的皮, 隐藏

words.translation: n. 魔术, 魔法；a. 魔术的, 有魔力的, 不可思议的

words.translation: n. 帐单, 清单, 钞票, 鸟嘴, 广告, 法案, 票据；vt. 开帐单, (用招贴)宣布

words.translation: a. 明亮的, 聪明的, 鲜明的, 欢快的；adv. 明亮地, 欢快地

words.translation: n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的

words.translation: n. 饲料, 一餐, 饲养；vt. 喂, 饲养, 放牧, 靠...为生

words.translation: a. 热的, 热心的, 辣的, 热情的, 激动的, 猛烈的, 紧迫的；adv. 热, 紧迫地

words.translation: adv. 作为替代, 反而

words.translation: adv. 一点也不, 毫不；pron. 没有人, 无一物, 并无一个

words.translation: a. 漂亮的, 优美的, 机灵的, 狡猾的, 恰当的；adv. 相当, 颇

words.translation: n. 关心, 注意, 尊敬, 关系, 问候；vt. 视为, 注意, 考虑, 和...有关, 看待

words.translation: n. 重复, 反复；vt. 重做, 重复, 复述, 使再现, 复制
